# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import 'reflect-metadata';
import express from 'express';
import { DataSource, Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, Repository } from 'typeorm';

// 1. Define the Product Entity
@Entity()
export class Product {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id!: number;

  @Column()
  name!: string;

  @Column({ type: 'text', nullable: true })
  description?: string;

  @Column({ type: 'decimal', precision: 10, scale: 2 })
  price!: number;

  @Column()
  category!: string;

  @Column()
  brand!: string;

  @Column({ type: 'int', default: 0 })
  stock!: number;

  @Column({ default: true })
  isActive!: boolean;
}

// 2. TypeORM Data Source Configuration
// Using an in-memory SQLite for demonstration.
// For production, configure with your actual database (PostgreSQL, MySQL, etc.)
const AppDataSource = new DataSource({
  type: 'sqlite',
  database: ':memory:', // In-memory database
  synchronize: true, // Auto-create tables (for development, use migrations in production)
  logging: false,
  entities: [Product],
});

// 3. Express Application Setup
const app = express();
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

// Middleware to parse JSON bodies
app.use(express.json());

// 4. Product Search Endpoint
app.get('/products/search', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const productRepository: Repository<Product> = AppDataSource.getRepository(Product);

    // Destructure and type-hint query parameters
    const {
      name,
      category,
      brand,
      minPrice,
      maxPrice,
      minStock,
      isActive,
      limit,
      offset,
      orderBy,
      orderDir,
    } = req.query;

    const queryParts: string[] = ['SELECT * FROM product WHERE 1=1'];
    const parameters: any[] = [];
    let paramIndex = 1; // Used for $1, $2, etc. in parameterized queries

    // Dynamically build WHERE clauses based on provided query parameters
    if (name) {
      queryParts.push(`AND name LIKE $${paramIndex++}`);
      parameters.push(`%${name}%`);
    }

    if (category) {
      queryParts.push(`AND category = $${paramIndex++}`);
      parameters.push(category);
    }

    if (brand) {
      queryParts.push(`AND brand = $${paramIndex++}`);
      parameters.push(brand);
    }

    if (minPrice) {
      const price = parseFloat(minPrice as string);
      if (!isNaN(price)) {
        queryParts.push(`AND price >= $${paramIndex++}`);
        parameters.push(price);
      }
    }

    if (maxPrice) {
      const price = parseFloat(maxPrice as string);
      if (!isNaN(price)) {
        queryParts.push(`AND price <= $${paramIndex++}`);
        parameters.push(price);
      }
    }

    if (minStock) {
      const stock = parseInt(minStock as string, 10);
      if (!isNaN(stock)) {
        queryParts.push(`AND stock >= $${paramIndex++}`);
        parameters.push(stock);
      }
    }

    if (isActive !== undefined) {
      // Convert 'true'/'false' strings to boolean
      const active = (isActive as string).toLowerCase() === 'true';
      queryParts.push(`AND isActive = $${paramIndex++}`);
      parameters.push(active ? 1 : 0); // SQLite stores booleans as 0 or 1
    }

    // Add ORDER BY clause
    if (orderBy) {
      const allowedOrderBy = ['id', 'name', 'price', 'category', 'brand', 'stock'];
      if (allowedOrderBy.includes(orderBy as string)) {
        const direction =
          orderDir && (orderDir as string).toUpperCase() === 'DESC' ? 'DESC' : 'ASC';
        queryParts.push(`ORDER BY "${orderBy}" ${direction}`);
      } else {
        // Log warning or throw error for disallowed order by columns
        console.warn(`Invalid orderBy column: ${orderBy}. Ignoring order.`);
      }
    }

    // Add LIMIT and OFFSET for pagination
    if (limit) {
      const limitValue = parseInt(limit as string, 10);
      if (!isNaN(limitValue) && limitValue > 0) {
        queryParts.push(`LIMIT $${paramIndex++}`);
        parameters.push(limitValue);
      }
    }

    if (offset) {
      const offsetValue = parseInt(offset as string, 10);
      if (!isNaN(offsetValue) && offsetValue >= 0) {
        queryParts.push(`OFFSET $${paramIndex++}`);
        parameters.push(offsetValue);
      }
    }

    // Join all parts to form the final SQL query string
    const finalQuery = queryParts.join(' ');

    console.log('Executing SQL:', finalQuery); // For debugging
    console.log('Parameters:', parameters); // For debugging

    // Execute the dynamic query using TypeORM's query method
    // Note: TypeORM's query method with template literals is used here
    // for structuring the query, but values are passed as parameters
    // for SQL injection prevention, which is best practice.
    const products = await productRepository.query(finalQuery, parameters);

    res.json(products);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error during product search:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ message: 'Internal server error' });
  }
});

// 5. Initialize Database and Start Server
AppDataSource.initialize()
  .then(async () => {
    console.log('Data Source has been initialized!');

    // Seed some initial data for testing
    const productRepository = AppDataSource.getRepository(Product);
    await productRepository.save([
      { name: 'Laptop Pro X', description: 'Powerful laptop for professionals', price: 1200.00, category: 'Electronics', brand: 'TechBrand', stock: 50, isActive: true },
      { name: 'Gaming Mouse RGB', description: 'High-precision gaming mouse', price: 75.50, category: 'Electronics', brand: 'GameGear', stock: 200, isActive: true },
      { name: 'Ergonomic Keyboard', description: 'Comfortable keyboard for long use', price: 90.00, category: 'Electronics', brand: 'OfficeTech', stock: 120, isActive: true },
      { name: 'Coffee Maker Deluxe', description: 'Brew perfect coffee every time', price: 150.00, category: 'Home Appliances', brand: 'BrewMaster', stock: 80, isActive: true },
      { name: 'Smartwatch Lite', description: 'Track your fitness and notifications', price: 199.99, category: 'Wearables', brand: 'FitLife', stock: 150, isActive: true },
      { name: 'Wireless Headphones', description: 'Noise-cancelling audio experience', price: 250.00, category: 'Electronics', brand: 'AudioPro', stock: 90, isActive: true },
      { name: 'Desktop PC Gamer', description: 'High-end gaming desktop', price: 1800.00, category: 'Electronics', brand: 'GameGear', stock: 30, isActive: false },
      { name: 'Smart TV 55 inch', description: '4K Ultra HD Smart TV', price: 799.00, category: 'Electronics', brand: 'VisionTech', stock: 70, isActive: true },
      { name: 'Blender Pro', description: 'Heavy duty blender for smoothies', price: 89.99, category: 'Home Appliances', brand: 'KitchenAid', stock: 110, isActive: true },
    ]);
    console.log('Products seeded.');

    app.listen(PORT, () => {
      console.log(`Server is running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);
      console.log('Try visiting:');
      console.log(`  http://localhost:${PORT}/products/search?category=Electronics`);
      console.log(`  http://localhost:${PORT}/products/search?name=Laptop`);
      console.log(`  http://localhost:${PORT}/products/search?minPrice=100&maxPrice=200`);
      console.log(`  http://localhost:${PORT}/products/search?category=Electronics&minPrice=100&orderBy=price&orderDir=DESC&limit=2`);
      console.log(`  http://localhost:${PORT}/products/search?isActive=false`);
    });
  })
  .catch((error) => console.error('Error during Data Source initialization:', error));

/*
Example Usage with curl:

1. Search all products in 'Electronics' category:
   curl "http://localhost:3000/products/search?category=Electronics"

2. Search products with 'Laptop' in their name:
   curl "http://localhost:3000/products/search?name=Laptop"

3. Search products between $100 and $200:
   curl "http://localhost:3000/products/search?minPrice=100&maxPrice=200"

4. Complex search: 'Electronics' category, min price $100, ordered by price DESC, limit 2:
   curl "http://localhost:3000/products/search?category=Electronics&minPrice=100&orderBy=price&orderDir=DESC&limit=2"

5. Search for inactive products:
   curl "http://localhost:3000/products/search?isActive=false"

6. Search for products with stock greater than 100:
   curl "http://localhost:3000/products/search?minStock=100"
*/
